source_reviews.notes: Accessible Census SUSB table page supports the establishment-industry/receipt-band dataset used for the frozen 28-firm target band.
Accessible Census NAICS archive defines 541930 as written translation, spoken interpretation, and sign-language services, supporting the scoped archetype split.
Accessible Census NAPCS product list supplies translation and interpretation product-scope context; it is used only alongside the provider enumeration.
Accessible Nimdzi 2024 ranking identifies the named U.S./U.S.-China providers and their stated service mixes, supporting the narrow, explicitly incomplete enumeration.
Accessible ATA review reports material translation and interpreting activity and contractor reliance; the packet correctly does not use it for cash-cost or outcome primitives.
Accessible Census SUSB table page supports the establishment-industry/receipt-band dataset used for the frozen 28-firm denominator.
Accessible Census NAICS archive supports the 541930 scope used for selected-archetype coverage.
Accessible Census NAPCS product list supports product-scope context for the selected archetype.
Accessible Nimdzi ranking supports the named provider cohort and service-mix classification used in the 7-of-14 enumeration.
Accessible ATA review supports the coexistence of material translation and interpreting activity; it is used only as context for archetype coverage.

Reviewed 0.25/0.50/0.75: 7/14/21 divided by 28. Sources support the narrow enumeration, while its incompleteness and overlapping archetype ranges are disclosed and force UNPROVEN.

publication_caveats: inputs.controllable_contractor_cash_cost: Freelance linguist purchases are not presumed pass-through or quantified here.
inputs.employee_cash_cost: Broad-industry payroll share is not a substitute.
inputs.normalized_y5_operating_state: No sponsor transformation is assumed.
inputs.recognized_revenue: Gross billings are not substituted for controllable value-added revenue.
inputs.target_archetype_coverage: The provider cohort is incomplete and selection uncertainty remains true.
industry_spec.value_basis: Do not use any veterinary occupation from the dataset's 4-digit 5419 OEWS mix.
industry_spec.value_basis: Do not treat employee payroll share as total controllable cash cost in a contractor-intensive provider model.
industry_spec.value_basis: Do not infer revenue pass-through, controllable contractor cost, or mutually exclusive role weights from worker counts, task incidence, or broad-industry occupation shares.
industry_spec.value_basis: Selection uncertainty requires any future target-specific basis to encompass plausible reclassification to the overlapping interpreting-led archetype.
summary: Mechanics, identity, fresh finalization, memo, arithmetic, separations, and readiness all reproduce. Registered sources support only the narrow selected-archetype enumeration and scope; all unsupported economic primitives remain honestly MISSING, so the record is UNPROVEN/EVIDENCE_FIRST and publishable only with the exact authored caveats.
